let s : ℂ := -2 * n
  have h_s : s ≠ 1 := by
    intro h
    apply_fun Complex.re at h
    simp [s] at h
    linarith [hn]
  have h_s0 : s ≠ 0 := by
    intro h
    apply_fun Complex.re at h
    simp [s] at h
    linarith [hn]
  have h_comp : riemannCompletedZeta s ≠ 0 := riemannCompletedZeta_ne_zero h_s h_s0
  have h_zeta := riemannCompletedZeta_eq_zeta h_s
  rw [h_zeta] at h_comp
  intro h_deriv
  have h_zero : riemannZeta s = 0 := by
    rw [show s = -2 * ((n - 1) + 1) by simp [Nat.sub_add_cancel hn]]
    apply riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one
  -- If both riemannZeta s = 0 and its derivative are zero, then the order of the zero is at least 2.
  -- Since Gamma(s/2) has a simple pole at s = -2n, the product would still have a zero.
  -- This contradicts the fact that riemannCompletedZeta s ≠ 0.
  apply h_comp
  have h_lim := Complex.Gamma_hasResidueAt_neg_nat n
  simp [h_zero, h_deriv]
  sorry

rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel hn, riemannZeta_deriv_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one (n - 1)]
  have : 1 < (2 * (n - 1) + 3 : ℂ).re := by simp; linarith
  simp [riemannZeta_ne_zero_of_one_lt_re this, Real.pi_ne_zero, Nat.factorial_ne_zero]

  have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun z => Complex.cos (Real.pi * z / 2)) (-(Complex.sin (Real.pi * s / 2) * (Real.pi / 2))) s :=
    (hasDerivAt_id s |>.mul_const (Real.pi / 2)).cos
  have h_has := (h1.hasDerivAt.mul h2).congr_left (fun z => (riemannZeta_one_sub z).symm)
  have h_deriv : deriv riemannZeta (-2 * n) = (2 * (2 * Real.pi) ^ (-s) * (Real.pi / 2 * Complex.sin (Real.pi * s / 2)) * Complex.Gamma s * riemannZeta s) := by
    rw [← (by ring : 1 - s = -2 * n), ← deriv_comp_const_sub (differentiableAt_riemannZeta _ (by simp [s]; norm_cast; linarith)), h_has.deriv]; ring
  rw [h_deriv]
  simp [Real.pi_ne_zero, Complex.cpow_ne_zero, Complex.Gamma_ne_zero (by simp [s]; norm_cast; linarith),
    riemannZeta_ne_zero_of_one_lt_re (by simp [s]; norm_cast; linarith), s, Complex.sin_pi_div_two_add_int_mul_pi (n : ℤ)]

  rw [show riemannZeta = fun z => (2^z * π^(z-1) * Gamma (1-z) * riemannZeta (1-z)) * sin (π * z / 2) by
    ext1 z; rw [riemannZeta_fn_eq]; ring, deriv_mul]
  · simp [s, Complex.sin_nat_mul_pi, Complex.cos_nat_mul_pi, Complex.cpow_ne_zero, pi_ne_zero,

    · exact (differentiableAt_const_cpow (Or.inl pi_ne_zero)).comp s (DifferentiableAt.sub_const differentiableAt_id 1)
    · exact (differentiableAt_Gamma (by intro m; linarith)).comp s (DifferentiableAt.const_sub differentiableAt_id 1)
    · exact (differentiableAt_riemannZeta (by simp [s]; linarith)).comp s (DifferentiableAt.const_sub differentiableAt_id 1)
  · exact (differentiableAt_id.const_mul _).sin

by
  apply zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple (-2 * n)
  · simp [CriticalStrip]; linarith
  · rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel hn]
    push_cast
    exact riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one (n - 1)

let s : ℂ := 2 * (n : ℂ) + 1
  have h_deriv := (hasDerivAt_riemannZeta (by norm_cast; linarith)).comp_const_sub (1 : ℂ)
  rw [show 1 - s = -2 * (n : ℂ) by ring] at h_deriv
  rw [← neg_ne_zero, ← h_deriv.deriv, (Filter.EventuallyEq.of_forall fun z => riemannZeta_one_sub z).deriv_eq]
  rw [deriv_mul_zero_right (x := s)]
  · apply mul_ne_zero
    · repeat apply mul_ne_zero
      · exact two_ne_zero
      · apply Complex.cpow_ne_zero; simp [Real.pi_ne_zero]
      · rw [Complex.Gamma_nat_eq_factorial (2 * n)]; norm_cast; exact Nat.factorial_ne_zero (2 * n)
      · apply riemannZeta_ne_zero_of_one_lt_re; simp [s]; norm_cast; linarith
    · have hg := HasDerivAt.cos (HasDerivAt.mul_const (hasDerivAt_id s) (π / 2))
      rw [hg.deriv, show π * s / 2 = (n : ℂ) * π + π / 2 by ring]
      simp; apply mul_ne_zero
      · apply neg_ne_zero; exact div_ne_zero (by simp [Real.pi_ne_zero]) two_ne_zero
      · apply Int.units_ne_zero
  · apply DifferentiableAt.mul
    · apply DifferentiableAt.mul
      · apply DifferentiableAt.const_mul
        apply differentiableAt_const_cpow; left; simp [Real.pi_pos]
      · apply differentiableAt_Gamma; norm_cast; linarith
    · apply differentiableAt_riemannZeta (by norm_cast; linarith)
  · have hg := HasDerivAt.cos (HasDerivAt.mul_const (hasDerivAt_id s) (π / 2))
    rw [mul_comm] at hg; exact hg
  · rw [show π * s / 2 = (n : ℂ) * π + π / 2 by ring]; simp

apply zeros_outside_critical_strip_are_simple (-2 * ↑n)
  · simp [CriticalStrip, hn]; linarith [Nat.cast_pos.mpr hn]
  · obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero hn.ne'
    exact riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one k
